question: Which country is the league Eredivisie from? Eredivisie from refers to divisions.name = 'Eredivisie';
orig_question: Which country is the league Italy Serie A from? Italy Serie A from refers to League.name = 'Italy Serie A';
orig_masked: Which [C2] is the [T2] [V1] from? [V1] from refers to [T2].[C5] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C5]
orig_evidence: Italy Serie A from refers to League.name = 'Italy Serie A';
gold_sql: SELECT country FROM divisions WHERE name = 'Eredivisie'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t1.name FROM Country AS t1 INNER JOIN League AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.country_id WHERE t2.name = 'Italy Serie A'

question: What is the publisher's name of You Can Combat Computer Stress!?  You Can Combat Computer Stress! refers to titles.title = 'You Can Combat Computer Stress!'
orig_question: What is the publisher's name of Blue Beetle II?  Blue Beetle II refers to superhero_name = 'Blue Beetle II'
orig_masked: What is the [C15] of [V1]?  [V1] refers to [C28] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: You Can Combat Computer Stress! refers to titles.title = 'You Can Combat Computer Stress!'
orig_evidence: Blue Beetle II refers to superhero_name = 'Blue Beetle II'
gold_sql: SELECT T2.pub_name FROM titles as T1 INNER JOIN publishers AS T2 ON T1.pub_id = T2.pub_id WHERE T1.title = 'You Can Combat Computer Stress!'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.publisher_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN publisher AS T2 ON T1.publisher_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Blue Beetle II'

question: What are the ethnicity and net worth of Morgan Freeman? Morgan Freeman refers to name = 'Morgan Freeman';
orig_question: What are the race and alignment of Cameron Hicks? Cameron Hicks refers to superhero_name = 'Cameron Hicks';
orig_masked: What are the [C17] and [C1] of [V1]? [V1] refers to [C28] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: Morgan Freeman refers to name = 'Morgan Freeman';
orig_evidence: Cameron Hicks refers to superhero_name = 'Cameron Hicks';
gold_sql: SELECT Ethnicity, NetWorth FROM actor WHERE name = 'Morgan Freeman'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.race, T3.alignment FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id INNER JOIN alignment AS T3 ON T1.alignment_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Cameron Hicks'

question: List down at least five movie titles of Horror category.  Horror category refers to name = 'Horror'
orig_question: List down at least five full name of Demi-God superheroes.  Demi-God superheroes refers to race = 'Demi-God'
orig_masked: List down at least five [C20] of [V1] [T9].  [V1] [T9] refers to [C17] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C17]
gold_sql: SELECT T1.title FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category as T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T3.name = 'Horror'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.full_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T2.race = 'Demi-God'

question: Indicate the genre name of film AFRICAN EGG.  AFRICAN EGG refers to title = 'AFRICAN EGG';
orig_question: Indicate the attribute value of superhero Abomination.  Abomination refers to superhero_name = 'Abomination';
orig_masked: Indicate the [C10] of [T9] [V1].  [V1] refers to [C28] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: AFRICAN EGG refers to title = 'AFRICAN EGG';
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM film as T1 INNER JOIN film_category as T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category as T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.title = 'AFRICAN EGG'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.attribute_value FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Abomination'

question: How many home team goals have been scored by Club Brugge? Club Brugge refers to HomeTeam = 'Club Brugge'
orig_question: How many home team goal have been scored by Aaron Lennon? Aaron Lennon refers to player_name = 'Aaron Lennon'
orig_masked: How many [C94] have been [C94] by [V1]? [V1] refers to [C126] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
evidence: Club Brugge refers to HomeTeam = 'Club Brugge'
orig_evidence: Aaron Lennon refers to player_name = 'Aaron Lennon'
gold_sql: SELECT SUM(FTHG) FROM matchs WHERE HomeTeam = 'Club Brugge'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT SUM(t2.home_team_goal) FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN match AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.away_player_9 WHERE t1.player_name = 'Aaron Lennon'

question: What is the average heights of USA competitors? average heights refers to Avg(height); USA is name of region
orig_question: What is the average heights of Italy players? average heights refers to Avg(height); Italy is name of country
orig_masked: What is the average [C122] of [V1] [T4]? average [C122] refers to Avg([C122]); [V1] is [C2] of [T1]; [V1] is a value of the column [C2]
evidence: average heights refers to Avg(height); USA is name of region
orig_evidence: average heights refers to Avg(height); Italy is name of country
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T1.height) FROM person as T1 INNER JOIN person_region as T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region as T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T3.region_name = 'USA'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(T1.height) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.id) FROM Player AS T1 INNER JOIN Match AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.id INNER JOIN Country AS T3 ON T2.country_id = T3.ID WHERE T3.NAME = 'Italy'

question: List last names and employee salaries for employees from 'Atlanta'.  locationcity refers to the names of location.
orig_question: List account ID and account opening date for accounts from 'Prachatice'.  A2 refers to the names of districts.
orig_masked: List [C1] and [T1] [C2] [C2] for [T1] from '[V1]'.  [C24] refers to the names of [T5].; [V1] is a value of the column [C24]
evidence: locationcity refers to the names of location.
orig_evidence: A2 refers to the names of districts.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.lastname, T1.salary FROM employee as T1 INNER JOIN location as T2 ON T1.locationID = T2.locationID WHERE T2.locationcity = 'Atlanta'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T1.account_id, T1.date FROM account AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T2.A2 = 'Prachatice'
note: Grouped opening date into a link, as the combination is what signals the column link I think

question: What was the name of the first Horror film released? name means Title; 'Horror' refers to Genre;
orig_question: What was the gender of the first AORTITIS diagnosed patient? gender means SEX; 'AORTITIS' refers to Diagnosis;
orig_masked: What was the [C64] of the first [V1] [C61] [T3]? [C64] means [C64]; '[V1]' refers to [C61];; [V1] is a value of the column [C61]
evidence: name means Title; 'Horror' refers to Genre;
orig_evidence: gender means SEX; 'AORTITIS' refers to Diagnosis;
gold_sql: SELECT Title FROM movie WHERE Genre = 'Horror' ORDER BY "Release Date" ASC LIMIT 1
orig_gold_sql: SELECT SEX FROM Patient WHERE Diagnosis = 'AORTITIS' AND `First Date` IS NOT NULL ORDER BY `First Date` ASC LIMIT 1

question: Which genre does film ALASKA PHANTOM belong to?  genre refers to category.name; ALASKA PHANTOM refers to title = 'ALASKA PHANTOM';
orig_question: Which group does superhero A-Bomb belong to?  group refers to race; A-Bomb refers to superhero_name = 'A-Bomb';
orig_masked: Which [C17] does [T9] [V1] belong to?  [C17] refers to [C17]; [V1] refers to [C28] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: genre refers to category.name; ALASKA PHANTOM refers to title = 'ALASKA PHANTOM';
orig_evidence: group refers to race; A-Bomb refers to superhero_name = 'A-Bomb';
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM film as T1 INNER JOIN film_category as T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.title = 'ALASKA PHANTOM'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN race AS T2 ON T1.race_id = T2.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'A-Bomb'
